issues.display_title: Issue #3032: Create Notification User New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Create — Notification User New Layout

Build the User notification item/list layout in the new pages-new notification flow.

Scope

  • Notification row for user-related events (follow / mention etc.): actor avatar, action text, optional follow-back action, timestamp, read/unread state.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark). Slicing — API wiring separate.

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: open Notifications, user-type notifications present.

  1. Layout match — row (avatar, action text, action button, time) matches the design.
  2. Action — the follow-back / view-profile control renders per design (UI states).
  3. Read/unread — unread vs read states render distinctly.
  4. Long text — long names truncate as designed.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; ≥44px targets; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; action + read/unread + truncation; responsive; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #3031: Create Notification Post New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Create — Notification Post New Layout

Build the Post notification item/list layout in the new pages-new notification flow.

Scope

  • Notification row for post-related events (actor avatar, action text, target post thumbnail, timestamp, read/unread state).
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark). Slicing — API wiring separate.

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: open Notifications, post-type notifications present.

  1. Layout match — row (avatar, action text, post thumbnail, time) matches the design.
  2. Read/unread — unread vs read states render distinctly per design.
  3. Tap — the row affords navigation to the related post (UI).
  4. Long text — long action text/usernames truncate/wrap as designed.
  5. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; ≥44px targets; no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; read/unread + truncation; responsive; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #3068: Create Page Construction New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Create — Page Under Construction New Layout

Build the Under Construction / Coming Soon page layout in the new pages-new flow.

Scope

  • Full-page state: illustration/icon, "under construction" headline + supporting text, optional CTA. Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark).

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

  1. Layout match — illustration, headline, text, and any CTA match the design.
  2. CTA — if present, the action navigates correctly.
  3. Responsive — 375px and desktop; no overflow; content centered.
  4. Light/Dark — both themes legible; contrast holds.
  5. No errors — no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; responsive; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT

issues.display_title: Issue #3030: Create Bug Report New Layout
issues.main_description_html:
✂️ Create — Bug Report New Layout

Build the Bug Report screen/dialog in the new pages-new flow, replacing the legacy report-bug modal.

Scope

  • Bug report form (category/type, description, optional attachment/screenshot as designed) + submit; success/error states.
  • Standalone + OnPush + Tailwind 4 / Zard UI; semantic tokens (light/dark). Slicing — API wiring separate.

🧪 Test scenario (for QA)

Pre: open Bug Report.

  1. Layout match — fields (category, description, attachment), labels, and submit CTA match the design.
  2. States — empty/focus/filled/invalid and disabled-submit render as designed.
  3. Attachment — the attach/screenshot control renders per design (UI).
  4. Responsive + Light/Dark — 375px and desktop; both themes legible; ≥44px targets.
  5. No errors — no console errors.

Acceptance: matches design; fields + states + attachment control; responsive; light + dark; no console errors.

RESULT
